creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 211118
Proposed patch (since 520894 revision, Python 3.5+ variant)

Also possible to propose a patch, which uses Python 3.x only, since Python 3.7 version is by default in Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk file. It differs from attachment #210814 by using static patches. Otherwise, on committer preference.
